channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: AI-armed founders disrupting venture capitalism?
item.description: Indian venture capitalists hold billions, but the traditional funding model faces disruption. Founders now build and scale businesses with less capital due to AI and lower costs. This shift reduces founder dependence on venture capital. The industry's future … [ServiceNow]

item.title: Meta Stock 2026: Buy or Sell? Wall Street Says Strong Buy as AI and Ads Fuel Rally Toward $800+
item.description: MENLO PARK, Calif. — Meta Platforms Inc. stock has delivered solid gains in early 2026, closing at $676.87 on April 16 after a strong week that saw shares climb more than 7 percent in a single session earlier in the month. [Meta]

item.title: Sequoia raises $7 billion for its biggest-ever late-stage fund
